video_title: AI: thin repour layer self-levelling on a jar candle

seconds.vision_desc: Close-up of a thin stream of molten golden wax flowing down into the centre of a set jar candle
the fresh molten layer spreads outward from the wick in slow motion, glossy and self-levelling
golden wax pool widening across the set cream surface, stream continuing into the centre
slow-motion ripples as the thin repour layer levels itself around the wick
molten layer nearly covering the candle top, glossy reflections, pour stream thinning
the repour layer settles level across the jar, stream ending
glossy fresh wax layer self-levelled around the wick, slow motion sheen
finished thin repour layer, smooth glossy top in warm light

windows.embed_text: thin stream of molten golden wax flowing into the centre of a set jar candle, fresh second layer spreading outward and self-levelling around the wick, slow motion
